abilities.name: Disguised
abilities.text: This model may not be the target of actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Infiltrated
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may choose an enemy Scheme marker within 6". Make a Scheme marker in base contact with it. Then, remove the chosen marker.

actions.name: Incessant Questions
actions.effects: If this attack receives a raise, the target gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Pocketful of Personalities
triggers.text: Choose another ally. Declare an action printed on the chosen model's stat card targeting the same model, ignoring LoS and range.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Information Exchange
actions.effects: Target heals 2 and is moved 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Cryptic Message
triggers.text: When resolving, the target may move in any direction.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Expanding Influence
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4" toward a friendly model in its LoS.
